title: Home Screen - Device is up to date - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Home Screen shows "Device is up to date" status with battery levels and connected status for both earbuds on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure both earbuds are connected and have the latest firmware installed.
4. Locate the Status Box on the Home screen.
5. Verify the battery levels for Left, Right, and Case earbuds are displayed with green indicators.
6. Verify the 'connected' status is shown with a green indicator.
7. Verify the device image shows both earbuds.
8. Verify the 'Device is up to date' status is displayed.
9. Tap the Status Box to expand it.
10. Observe the 'Software' field within the expanded Status Box.
11. Verify the current software version is displayed with a green indicator.
expected: Home screen displays 'Device is up to date' status. Status Box shows battery levels for Left, Right, and Case earbuds with green indicators, a 'connected' status with green indicator, and a device image showing both earbuds. Tapping the Status Box reveals the 'Software' field with the current software version and green indicator.
